posts.author: HelenFromMoorvale
posts.text: Quick question for anyone who knows how this works: I'm trying to reset my account on [link removed] but it keeps asking me for a new security code and payment details. Can someone tell me if I need to send over my card number or just click through? #help
posts.explanation: This post directly solicits sensitive security codes and asks for payment information, which constitutes a clear credential-harvesting attempt requiring removal.
